items.title: Comment and Control: Hijacking Agentic Workflows via Context-Grounded Evolution
items.institution: Johns Hopkins University, Johns Hopkins University Applied Physics Lab, Wyze Labs

summary.zh: 本文首次系统性地研究了自动化平台中代理工作流的安全风险，指出了现有静态分析和传统 LLM 越狱方法在此场景下的局限性。通过提出 JAW 框架，结合静态路径分析、动态提示追踪和运行时能力分析，实现了对代理工作流的有效劫持检测与利用。大规模实验验证了该风险的普遍性和严重性，并推动了主流厂商的安全修复。
summary.en: This paper systematically investigates the security risks of agentic workflows in automation platforms, highlighting the inadequacy of existing static analysis and traditional LLM jailbreaking methods. By proposing the...

items.title: PIVOT: Bridging Planning and Execution in LLM Agents via Trajectory Refinement

summary.zh: PIVOT 证明了基于反馈（自监督或人工监督）的轨迹优化是缓解自主代理系统中规划-执行差距的原则性方法。通过将完整轨迹作为离散语言空间中的可优化对象，并结合单调接受机制，PIVOT 不仅在约束满足和任务成功率上取得了显著提升，还大幅降低了计算成本，为构建更可靠的 LLM 代理系统提供了新范式。
summary.en: - **Background**: LLM-based autonomous agents often generate plans that appear coherent but fail during execution due to infeasible actions, constraint violations, and compounding errors over long horizons. This...

items.title: ExploitGym: Can AI Agents Turn Security Vulnerabilities into Real Attacks?
items.institution: UC Berkeley, Max Planck Institute for Security and Privacy, UC Santa Barbara, Arizona State University, Anthropic, OpenAI, Google

summary.zh: ExploitGym 填补了 AI 安全评估中关于“漏洞利用”这一关键环节的空白。通过大规模真实场景的测试，论文证明了前沿 AI 模型已具备将漏洞转化为实际攻击的显著能力，即便在面对现代防御机制时也不例外。这不仅为防御性工作流提供了有价值的诊断工具，也突显了日益强大的 AI Agent 所带来的潜在网络安全风险，呼吁社区重视对此类双用技术的监管与防御研究。
summary.en: - **Background**: As Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents rapidly advance, their potential to reshape cybersecurity necessitates rigorous evaluation. A critical capability is "exploitation": transforming a known...

items.title: gwBenchmarks: Stress-Testing LLM Agents on High-Precision Gravitational Wave Astronomy
items.institution: Kavli Institute for Theoretical Physics, University of California Santa Barbara; Center for Gravitational Physics, University of Texas at Austin; Department of Physics, Princeton University

summary.zh: 本文引入了 gwBenchmarks，首个针对高精度引力波天文学建模的 LLM Agent 基准测试。研究表明，尽管当前最先进的 LLM Agent 在简单科学任务上表现出一定的能力，但在面对需要极高精度和复杂物理推理的真实世界科学建模问题时，仍存在显著缺陷，普遍无法满足领域标准的精度要求。该工作强调了开发更强大的物理感知 Agent 和更严格评估框架的必要性。
summary.en: - **Background**: Modern gravitational wave astronomy relies on high-precision modeling tasks (e.g., building waveform surrogates, black hole orbital dynamics) that typically require months of graduate-level effort and...

items.title: OLIVIA: Online Learning via Inference-time Action Adaptation for Decision Making in LLM ReAct Agents
items.institution: University of California, San Diego; University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign; Adobe Research

summary.zh: OLIVIA 证明了在 LLM 代理中引入显式的在线决策层是纯提示或检索基于适应方法的有效替代方案。通过将动作选择建模为上下文线性 Bandit 问题，OLIVIA 实现了细粒度、可追踪且具备不确定性意识的推理时适应，为部署环境下的 LLM 代理提供了高效、低开销的性能提升路径。
summary.en: - **Background**: Large Language Model (LLM) agents typically operate in a ReAct style in deployed settings, interleaving reasoning, action selection, and observation to solve multi-step decision-making tasks. In...
